basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate, Graphic Design and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.post_name: Research Associate, Graphic Design and More
basic_details.notification_number: IITG/I&SI/Research Associate, Graphic Design and More Recct-2026/120
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Research Associate, Graphic Design and More Notification 2026 has been released through Advertisement No. IITG/I&SI/Research Associate, Graphic Design and More Recct-2026/120 on the official website of IIT Guwahati. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Guwahati Research Associate, Graphic Design and More Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D Degree in Craft Pedagogy and Design, Masters in design, Bachelor's degree in Engineering (Computer Science and allied disciplines)
qualification.details: Research Associate (1): Ph.D Degree in Craft Pedagogy and Design Graphic Design: Masters in design Assistant Project Engineer: Bachelor's degree in Engineering (Computer Science and allied disciplines)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the IIT Guwahati Project Staff recruitment is 16th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff at IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for Project Staff posts released by IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for this recruitment through the Online mode only.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered varies by post, with Rs. 58000 for Research Associate, Rs. 49000 for Graphic Design, and Rs. 42000 for Assistant Project Engineer.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Qualifications range from a Bachelor's degree in Engineering to a Master's in Design and a Ph.D. in Craft Pedagogy and Design, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Guwahati Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Staff positions at IIT Guwahati will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: IIT Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q10. When is the interview date?
faq.answer: The interview date for the IIT Guwahati Project Staff recruitment is scheduled for 17th June 2026.
